steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
To factor $z^2 + 10z - 24 = 0$, I need two numbers that multiply to $-24$ and add to \$10$.
Testing: $12 \times (-2) = -24$ and $12 + (-2) = 10$ ✓
The equation factors as $(z + 12)(z - 2) = 0$

steps.title: Solve using the zero product property
steps.content:
Set each factor to zero:
$z + 12 = 0 \Rightarrow z = -12$
$z - 2 = 0 \Rightarrow z = 2$
One of the solutions to the equation is \$2$.
